activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: We've signed the contract yesterday.

evaluator.answer: We signed the contract yesterday

activities.explanation: «Yesterday» exige past simple: «signed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: We received twelve applications so far.

evaluator.answer: We have received twelve applications so far

activities.explanation: «So far» mantiene el recuento abierto y requiere present perfect.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle error.
activities.prompt: Have you ever saw the Northern Lights?

evaluator.answer: Have you ever seen the Northern Lights

activities.explanation: Después de «have» necesitamos el participio «seen».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: Mina has visited Edinburgh last year.

evaluator.answer: Mina visited Edinburgh last year

activities.explanation: «Last year» es un periodo terminado y usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the present perfect form.
activities.prompt: The bus has just arrive, so we can get on now.

evaluator.answer: The bus has just arrived, so we can get on now

activities.explanation: Después de «has just» necesitamos el participio «arrived».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: I have sent the file ten minutes ago.

evaluator.answer: I sent the file ten minutes ago

activities.explanation: «Ago» sitúa el envío en un momento pasado cerrado.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the past simple form.
activities.prompt: We didn't made a decision at yesterday's meeting.

evaluator.answer: We didn't make a decision at yesterday's meeting

activities.explanation: Después de «didn't» usamos el infinitivo «make».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the tense and word order.
activities.prompt: When have you bought this camera?

evaluator.answer: When did you buy this camera

activities.explanation: «When» pide el momento pasado: «did you buy».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence for the unfinished week.
activities.prompt: It is Wednesday, and the college held four workshops this week.

evaluator.answer: It is Wednesday, and the college has held four workshops this week

activities.explanation: La semana sigue abierta y el recuento usa «has held».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: The college has held four workshops last week.

evaluator.answer: The college held four workshops last week

activities.explanation: «Last week» es un periodo terminado y exige past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the verb after «did».
activities.prompt: Where did you gave the presentation?

evaluator.answer: Where did you give the presentation

activities.explanation: Después de «did» usamos el infinitivo «give».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle error.
activities.prompt: I have lose my keys, so I can't open the door.

evaluator.answer: I have lost my keys, so I can't open the door

activities.explanation: El resultado actual usa present perfect con el participio «lost».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense error.
activities.prompt: I have found my keys under the sofa yesterday evening.

evaluator.answer: I found my keys under the sofa yesterday evening

activities.explanation: «Yesterday evening» fecha el hallazgo y requiere past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence for the unfinished morning.
activities.prompt: It is 10.30 a.m., and I had two meetings so far this morning.

evaluator.answer: It is 10.30 a.m., and I have had two meetings so far this morning

activities.explanation: La mañana sigue abierta y «so far» refuerza el uso de «have had».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence for the finished morning.
activities.prompt: It is 6 p.m., and I have had two meetings this morning.

evaluator.answer: It is 6 p.m., and I had two meetings this morning

activities.explanation: A las seis, la mañana se presenta como un periodo terminado.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence for a closed lifetime.
activities.prompt: The composer died in 1947. She has written three operas.

evaluator.answer: The composer died in 1947. She wrote three operas

activities.explanation: La vida y la producción están cerradas, así que usamos «wrote».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence for an open lifetime.
activities.prompt: The composer is still active. She wrote three operas so far.

evaluator.answer: The composer is still active. She has written three operas so far

activities.explanation: La producción puede continuar y «so far» exige present perfect.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the dated detail.
activities.prompt: The council has approved the plan. It has voted for it on Tuesday.

evaluator.answer: The council has approved the plan. It voted for it on Tuesday

activities.explanation: La noticia usa present perfect, pero «on Tuesday» exige past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence to match the current location.
activities.prompt: Marta isn't in the office because she has been to the bank.

evaluator.answer: Marta isn't in the office because she has gone to the bank

activities.explanation: «Has gone to» indica que Marta todavía está fuera.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the tense for an open recent period.
activities.prompt: The neighbourhood changed considerably in recent years.

evaluator.answer: The neighbourhood has changed considerably in recent years

activities.explanation: «In recent years» mantiene una conexión abierta con el presente.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting subject–auxiliary agreement.
activities.prompt: Neither supplier have made a firm offer so far.

evaluator.answer: Neither supplier has made a firm offer so far

activities.explanation: «Neither supplier» es singular y requiere «has made».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting agreement after «either».
activities.prompt: This is the first time either of us have chaired a public meeting.

evaluator.answer: This is the first time either of us has chaired a public meeting

activities.explanation: «Either of us» se trata como singular y usa «has chaired».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete reply, correcting the dated detail.
activities.prompt: Reply to “Have you ever worked abroad?”: Yes, I have worked in Oslo in 2021.

evaluator.answer: Yes, I worked in Oslo in 2021

activities.explanation: La pregunta usa present perfect; el detalle fechado «in 2021» usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the participle.
activities.prompt: The analyst has just upload the revised figures.

evaluator.answer: The analyst has just uploaded the revised figures

activities.explanation: Después de «has just» usamos el participio «uploaded».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete report, correcting the dated detail.
activities.prompt: A pipe has burst in the library. Staff have discovered the leak at 7.15 this morning.

evaluator.answer: A pipe has burst in the library. Staff discovered the leak at 7.15 this morning

activities.explanation: La hora concreta fecha el descubrimiento y exige past simple.
